name: Crepes with Cottage Cheese
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
Batter Preparation:
1 c White Flour
2 Eggs
2 tbsp Olive Oil or Melted Oleo
1/2 cup (Generous) Milk
1/2 cup (Generous) Water
Mushroom and Cottage Cheese Mixture:
1. Saute Mushrooms in 2 tablespoons Oleo for 2-3 minutes until tender.
2. Mix the sautéed mushrooms with the cottage cheese and season to taste.
Batter Mixing:
3. Put all batter ingredients in a food processor and whiz until smooth.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Use the crepe batter to make about 12 thin crepes.
6. Place a small amount of mushroom mixture in the center of each crepe, dividing it evenly among them.
7. Roll the crepes up and place them side by side in a shallow casserole dish.
8. Pour some whipped yogurt over the crepes.
9. Cover tightly with foil and bake for 20-30 minutes until heated through.
